core.label: Piet Fundamentals
core.description: Programs are abstract art — bitmaps where colors are instructions.

topics.label: Color Blocks
topics.description: 20 colors in a cycle. Instructions are determined by hue and lightness changes.

topics.label: Pointer & Codels
topics.description: Direction pointer (DP) and codel chooser (CC) navigate the image.

topics.label: Operations
topics.description: push, pop, add, subtract, multiply, divide, mod, not, greater, pointer, switch, dup, roll, in, out.
